历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) fluctuated significantly: approximately 44660 → 55994 → 42648 → 39716 → 56448; the 2025 baseline is about 56448, a substantial backward shift of about 16732 places compared to 2024, indicating a notable increase in competition that year; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi was 238 in 2021, 244 in 2022, 245 in 2023, 270 in 2024, and 270 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 269, a minimal reduction of 1 person compared to 2025, with a very small reduction scale, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has declined in recent years, approximately 198th in 2025, and not entering the top 200 in 2026, placing it in the middle-to-late segment of 211 universities; the university has no significant negative or positive events recorded in reputation evaluation documents; its overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 106th, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure and moderately low application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with overall discipline strength mainly at the B level, lacking top-tier discipline appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social popularity, but Qinghai University is located in the northwest, with limited regional appeal; in 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and increasing competitive pressure; Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, adjacent to Shaanxi Province but not a local university, with relatively weak regional preference for cross-province study; the university's enrollment in Shaanxi accounts for a small proportion (about 270 people), representing a medium scale of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the notable increase in physics category examinees in 2026 (+19.7%) leading to intensified competition, the minimal reduction in enrollment plan, and the decline in university ranking, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be approximately 56823, with a range of 56323–57323.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 青海大学医学类在陕西省近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年43034名（计划32人）、2022年43055名（计划32人）、2023年42144名（计划31人）、2024年39716名（计划33人） 、2025年56448名（计划40人）。2021至2024年间位次总体呈小幅波动下降趋势（从43034降至39716），但2025年出现大幅跳升，位次从39716跃至56448，增幅约42%，主要与当年 新高考选科要求（首选物理、再选化学和生物必选）收紧以及医学报考热度集中有关。2026年医学类招生计划为40人，与2025年持平，计划无扩缩变化，供需弹性系数为零。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 青海大学是国家'211工程'重点建设高校，入选国家'双一流'建设高校，是青海省唯一的综合性大学。学校医学部在西北地区具有一定办学历史与影响力，临床医学、口腔医学等 专业在区域内享有较好口碑。作为211高校，其对陕西考生仍具备较强的吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内持续保持高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学、麻醉学等专业竞争尤为激烈。青海大学地处西宁市，地理位置相对偏远，但作为211/双一流高校， 性价比突出，对中等分数段考生有较强吸引力。2025年位次大幅上升也反映出医学类在陕西考生中的热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合考量，2026年青海大学医学类最低录取位次预计为56248名，较2025年（56448名）略有回落约200名，波动区间为55748至56748名。2025年位次大幅跳升后，部分考生可能因 位次偏高而选择其他院校，导致2026年出现小幅回调，但医学热度持续、计划持平，回落幅度有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical category in Shaanxi Province over the past five years are: 2021: 43034 (planned 32 students), 2022: 43055 (planned 32 students), 2023: 42144 (planned 31 students), 2024: 39716 (planned 33 students), 2025: 56448 (planned 40 students). From 2021 to 2024, the rankings showed a slight fluctuating downward trend (from 43034 to 39716), but in 2025, there was a significant jump, with the ranking rising from 39716 to 56448, an increase of about 42%. This is mainly related to the tightening of the new college entrance examination subject requirements (first choice physics, then chemistry and biology required) and the concentrated popularity of medical applications. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 40 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, and the supply-demand elasticity coefficient is zero.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a key construction university under the national '211 Project', selected as a national 'Double First-Class' construction university, and is the only comprehensive university in Qinghai Province. The university's medical department has a certain history and influence in the northwest region, with clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors enjoying a good reputation in the region. As a 211 university, it still has strong appeal to Shaanxi candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have maintained high application popularity nationwide in recent years, with fierce competition in majors such as clinical medicine, stomatology, and anesthesiology. Qinghai University is located in Xining City, relatively remote geographically, but as a 211/Double First-Class university, it offers outstanding cost-effectiveness, strongly attracting middle-score candidates. The significant rise in rankings in 2025 also reflects the sustained popularity of medical majors among Shaanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Taking all factors into consideration, the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical category in 2026 is expected to be 56248, a slight decrease of about 200 places from 2025 (56448), with a fluctuation range of 55748 to 56748. After the significant jump in rankings in 2025, some candidates may choose other institutions due to the high ranking, leading to a slight correction in 2026. However, with sustained medical popularity and unchanged plans, the decline is limited.
